next_steps: Perform treponemal antibody screening (EIA or TP-PA) with reflex RPR/VDRL titration
HIV testing with 4th generation antigen/antibody assay
Serologic testing for ANA, ANCA (PR3/MPO), RF, and CCP
Punch biopsy of the scaling skin rash for histopathology and immunohistochemistry
Otolaryngology consultation for examination and biopsy of nasal crusting and mucosal ulceration
Complete metabolic panel and review of peripheral blood smear for cytopenias or macrocytosis
Full syphilis staging and consideration of lumbar puncture if neurosyphilis is suspected
